bug_locations.reason: include_router() recreates routes using self.add_api_route(), which uses the parent router's route_class instead of preserving the original child route class. This would cause nested routes to lose their custom APIRoute subclass types.

add_api_route() always instantiates self.route_class, ignoring any existing route instance type passed through include_router(). This likely contributes to custom route classes being overwritten during router inclusion.
